Related Entities

  • hospital AURORA MEDICAL CENTER SHEBOYGAN COUNTY 5-star overall rating
  • hospital ST NICHOLAS HOSPITAL 3-star overall rating
  • snf ROCKY KNOLL HEALTH CARE 3-star, 149 beds
  • snf SHEBOYGAN HEALTH SERVICES 3-star, 64 beds
  • snf SHEBOYGAN PROGRESSIVE HEALTH SERVICES 4-star, 50 beds
  • snf Edenbrook Sheboygan 1-star, 121 beds
  • snf Sheboygan Senior Community Inc 2-star, 60 beds
  • snf Meadow View Health Services 5-star, 50 beds
  • snf Morningside Health Services 4-star, 50 beds
  • snf Plymouth Health Services 1-star, 50 beds
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-13. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026) CDC SDOH Measures for County (2017-2021)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
